raw_text: Mattermost versions 11.3.x < = 11.3.0, 11.2.x < = 11.2.2, 10.11.x < = 10.11.10 fail to bound memory allocation when processing DOC files which allows an authenticated attacker to cause server memory exhaustion and denial of service via uploading a specially crafted DOC file.. Mattermost Advisory ID: MMSA-2026-00581
